items.name: Fried Mughlai Chicken Over Rice
items.description:
Fried halal chicken made with our signature proprietary royal blend, served with special ginger basmati curry sauce rice, sumac onion slaw, lettuce, and house-made special garlic white sauce.
* Allergen: Contains Dairy. Contains Gluten

items.name: Street-Cart Chicken Biryani (Tawa Style)

* Allergen: Contains Dairy.
